title: Schmaltzia simplicifolia
taxonomy: Schmaltzia simplicifolia is a species of plant in the family Anacardiaceae, commonly known as the cashew family. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Further classification of Schmaltzia simplicifolia is as follows: it is placed in the genus Schmaltzia and its botanical classification is Schmaltzia simplicifolia. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other plants in the family. The exact relationships and classification of Schmaltzia simplicifolia may still be subject to ongoing research and revisions.
